name: Craftimals: Build to the Sun
short_description: Build your way to the sun in this cozy, creative sandbox platformer! Stack blocks, unlock powers, wear silly hats, and play solo or in 2-player couch co-op.
detailed_description:
Craftimals: Build to the Sun is the return of a classic! Originally an Xbox Live Indie Game fan favorite, this relaxing sandbox platformer combines simple block-stacking with adorable animal characters on a journey straight to the sky.

🧱 Use intuitive building mechanics to construct your own path

🐾 Team up in 2-player local co-op or go it alone

🌞 Reach checkpoints to unlock new powers, cute hats, and other surprises

🎨 Place blocks freely (no grids, no limits) and build in any direction

Whether you're chasing the sun, creating sky-high art, or just enjoying some stress-free platforming, Craftimals is a wholesome experience for all ages.

Key Features


🧩 Easy-to-learn building with satisfying vertical progression

👯‍♂️ Local 2-player, split screen co-op

🎵 New soundtrack by Audionautix

🧢 Hats (so many hats)

🖌️ Creative freedom in a giant, open canvas

🏆 Steam achievements and leaderboards

What's New (and What's Not)


This is a faithful PC port of the 2012 original, now updated with keyboard/mouse support and some modern Steam perks.

If you're looking for a more advanced evolution of this idea, then check out our other game, Doggo Dig Down, which is the spiritual successor to Craftimals.
